title: Apiary Landing-Pad Spread: Maximize the Faintest Foraging Triangle
strategies: reference baseline: reproduce the checker's fixed pseudo-random folded-triangle layout (scores ~0.1)
best-of-many-random: sample many independent random layouts and keep the one whose faintest triangle is largest
targeted local search: multi-start hill-climbing that repeatedly perturbs a vertex of the currently faintest triangle to enlarge the minimum area
structured lattice spreads: near-regular triangular sublattices / boundary-plus-interior placements tuned to avoid thin triples
